title: Existing pulse made into subtask?
excerpt: Is there a way to take an existing item and turn it into a subitem for an existing item? For example; I have a group called X with items 1, 2 & 3. I need to make item 2 a subitem of 1, still under group X. Is there a way…

posts.author: Phill (Phill Allen)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to take an existing item and turn it into a subitem for an existing item? For example; I have a group called X with items 1, 2 & 3. I need to make item 2 a subitem of 1, still under group X. Is there a way to make this happen without recreating the existing item 2 as a new subitem of 1, then deleting the original item 2?

posts.author: Scragemi (Emily Scragg)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes - I want this too! Want to move an item into a subitem with some kind of ease

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Phill:

Is there a way to take an existing item and turn it into a subitem

They’re working on it. It’s in the “Up Next” section on the subitem roadmap.
https://view.monday.com/480751376-c22b2fe6c069076f55f20289b4d3f04f

See “Convert items to subitems and vice versa”

posts.author: onlinepilatesclasses (Brad Crowell)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @JohnW did this ever get implemented?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @onlinepilatesclasses I don’t work for Monday. I just see the roadmaps like everyone else.

Having said that, I don’t see the option on my account so I assume they’re still working on it.

posts.author: onlinepilatesclasses (Brad Crowell)
posts.cookedHtml: @JohnW apologies for the assumption. Cheers!
